## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / detector / policy primitive
- [ ] Framework or backend adapter
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Paste the commands you ran. -->

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] If docs changed, links and code samples render correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII committed
- [ ] No unverifiable claims added to README or docs
